pr.title: Decomp campaign: pipeline hardening, near-miss banking, batched cracking + wins

summary: Large 62-commit campaign PR combining real decomp wins (colosseum_battle +53 byte-exact, MObj/GSthread/gs_material matches) with major fleet-orchestration hardening: near-miss banking so 90-99% matches are no longer discarded, an atomic file-lock rewrite, a single source-of-truth measure cache, and batched cheap-agent cracking.
decomp_lessons: Near-misses (90-99% real-C the fleet can't fully close) were being thrown away; banking them (band.py bank / bank-file) and splicing with a strict no-regress + asm/.inc fraud guard feeds the permuter queue instead of wasting the work.
A dashboard/DONE bucket count can freeze and silently understate progress by hundreds of wins if band_wins aren't re-bucketed live.
sqlite-based dispatch locks caused a hot-path bottleneck; O_EXCL file-based atomic locks (locks.py) fixed cost/correctness together.
Draining a work lane only when it's *currently* idle (not on every /clear) avoids wiping in-progress agent work.
smart_moves: Reshape mode: from-scratch m2c-draft -> real-C conversion specifically for LOW-confidence Ghidra drafts, gated behind .reshape_first.

lever-crack-batch workflow: Sonnet cracks + Haiku independently verifies the mechanical REG-COLORING subset, documented in ECONOMIC_MODEL.md as the cheap tier between free permuter and expensive Opus reshape.
pane_io wedge-watchdog auto-restarts a stuck capture loop, addressing agents idling too long under load.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Jump-table walls in pokemon.c stopped from re-grinding once identified as unproductive.
GSthread sibling stubs (gs_texture, gs_thread destroy/unlink) matched to 100% as a batch once one was solved.

key_files.role: Large Ghidra-draft reshape landed +53 byte-exact functions, gated behind no-regress check.
Largest single-file diff in the PR (+339/-17); matrix helper matches from the campaign.
New: splices banked near-miss (90-99%) reshapes into canon with strict no-regress + fraud guard.
Rewrote dispatch locking from sqlite to atomic O_EXCL file locks; removes 'list' from the dispatch hot path.
New write-on-every-measure cache acting as single source of truth so dashboard buckets reflect reality between ledger rebuilds.
Re-buckets band_wins into DONE live, fixing a frozen ~400-win-understated DONE count.
